summary: Afternoon cycle (#1202). Significant coordination wins: version drift resolved (cloud + analytics both now on 2.9.0), issue #1182 (identity bridge chicken-and-egg) closed, PR #1150 (Studio EM) closed, stale PR #1226 (old EM report at v2.8.5) closed. Two PRs awaiting review: #1224 (site fix) and #1233 (v3.0 capture funnel). Persistent P0: swarm health #1186 (85.7% stuck, human intervention required). New HIGH: issue #1202 (AAB normalization failure — 3,825+ unintended default-deny blocks, largest single source of governance denials). KE-2 (#917) still unstarted. New dogfood: bash cross-directory reads default-denied by policy (expected behavior — Read tool works).

agentguardCloud.notes: Cloud CI green. PR #492 (telemetry CLI auth tests) was open last cycle — not re-checked this cycle.

agentguardAnalytics.notes: No recent CI runs. No open PRs detected.

dogfoodPatterns.description: During cross-repo coordination, `cat agentguard-analytics/package.json` via bash triggered default-deny (no matching policy rule, fail-closed). The Read tool bypassed this correctly. Behavior is as-designed — shell exec to sibling repos requires an explicit allow rule.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Confirm this is intended. Consider adding a scoped shell.exec allow for read-only cross-repo inspection by EM role agents. Or document that EM agents should use Read tool for cross-repo file inspection.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Agent identity bridge blocked by no-governance-self-modification invariant
dogfoodPatterns.description: CLOSED this cycle. Chicken-and-egg identity setup for scheduled agents resolved.
Multiple copilot-driver agents report version as 'unknown' in governance denial telemetry.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Agents should read agentguard version at startup; likely missing --agent-version flag or VERSION file in copilot CLI hooks

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: agentguard policy suggest redirects to cloud silently
dogfoodPatterns.description: policy suggest silently redirects to cloud instead of running locally when no cloud token is present. Blocks onboarding dry runs.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: DX squad: add --local flag or clear fallback message

crossCuttingIssues.title: Swarm Health Alert — P0 (2026-03-28, continuing from #1128)
crossCuttingIssues.description: 85.7% agent worktrees stuck. 12 stuck agents, 3 active. 133 enabled agents vs 32 max_workers (4× oversubscribed). 18 dead PID files. 2 cron collision groups.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Human required: git worktree prune, /tmp/ PID cleanup, cron collision fix (0 6 * * * and 45 */6 * * *), confirm cron daemon running. No agent resolution path.

crossCuttingIssues.title: KE-2: ActionContext — unstarted, critical path for v3.0
crossCuttingIssues.description: 0/4 checkboxes, no assignee, no PR. Sprint goal includes KE-2 unblock. Third consecutive cycle unstarted.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Escalate to kernel-sr. If no movement by next cycle, escalate to squad lead.

crossCuttingIssues.title: AAB action-type normalization failure — 3,825+ unintended default-deny decisions
crossCuttingIssues.description: AAB failing to normalize a significant portion of tool calls to known action types. They fall through to unknown → default-deny. Largest single source of governance denials. Filed 2026-03-28T08:05Z by governance-monitor-agent.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Assign to kernel squad. Priority: high. Impacts all agents running on current version.

crossCuttingIssues.title: 149 orphaned branches
crossCuttingIssues.action: Human batch cleanup or workspace-backlog-steward sprint

escalations.reason: Swarm health #1186: 85.7% stuck rate (ongoing), 133 agents vs 32 max_workers, cron daemon may not be running. Same state as prior 2 cycles — no human action taken yet.
Issue #1202: AAB normalization failure causing 3,825+ unintended default-deny blocks. Largest single source of governance denials — impacts all running agents. Needs assignment and fix.
KE-2 (#917) unstarted for 3 consecutive EM cycles. Sprint goal at risk. Needs assignment this cycle or sprint goal must be re-scoped.
PRs #1224 (site fix) and #1233 (v3.0 capture funnel) have been open 5-6h, all checks green. Need review.

sprintStatus.goal: Validate Go kernel→Cloud telemetry E2E pipeline (workspace #60, due Apr 17). KE-2 unblock. Swarm health resolution.
sprintStatus.progress: Version drift resolved (cloud + analytics on 2.9.0). Identity bridge unblocked (#1182 closed). KE-2 (#917) still unstarted — highest sprint risk for 3rd cycle. Swarm P0 (#1186) requires human action.
blockers: Swarm health P0 (#1186) — no agent resolution path, human intervention required for 3rd+ cycle
